sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68590" key="monomaxotrofei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονομᾰχο-τροφεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat.<sense id="n68590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ludus gladiatorius</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
